title: RBI (Rural Co-operative Banks– Undertaking of Financial Services) – Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
The issue was whether rural co-operative banks could expand into startup financing. RBI allowed AgriSURE inclusion, enabling funding for agri enterprises and boosting rural credit.
The post RBI (Rural Co-operative Banks– Undertaking of Financial Services) – Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
